title: Ethnographic Museum
subTitle: Muzeu Etnografik
description: Museum housing a variety of objects related to Berat's history, including a model medieval street.
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: Susan Desmarais
reviews.text: It was closed, supposedly under renovation, for three years, according to a shopkeeper.  Google Maps is quite incorrect with the listing of hours…even the hotel staff did not know.  I stayed an extra day just to see this museum🤷‍♀️🤷‍♀️🤷‍♀️🤷‍♀️

reviews.name: Andrea Brichtova
reviews.text: Closed for reatauration

reviews.name: sarah cranston
reviews.text: Closed foe renovations

reviews.name: Clare Rose
reviews.text: Such a pity that it's closed with no date for re opening 😞

reviews.name: Марина Шарлевич
reviews.text:
Нажаль зачинено досі ((
Чекаємо на відкриття , будівля дуже гарна
reviews.textTranslated:
Unfortunately it is still closed ((
We are waiting for the opening, the building is very beautiful

reviews.name: Astrid Herrmann
reviews.text: Closed for restoration

title: Shortcut to the Berat Castle
address: PW5X+8GR, Rruga Mihal Komnena, Berat, Albania
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: Matthias
reviews.text:
Definitiv der beste Weg zur Burg. Landschaftlich super schön, auch für unfitte(re) Menschen geeignet. Habe sogar eine Schildkröte auf dem Weg gesehen.
Wichtig: Zeckenschutz und wenn notwendig Allergietabletten gegen Pollen nicht vergessen
reviews.textTranslated:
Definitely the best way to the castle. The scenery is stunning, and it's suitable even for those who aren't very fit. I even saw a tortoise on the path.

Important: Don't forget tick repellent and, if necessary, allergy tablets for pollen.

reviewContext.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Free street parking

reviews.name: Anno Odenthal
reviews.text: Im Mai 26 leider ziemlich zugewachsen mit Teilweise Stacheliegen Pflanzen, trotzdem konnten wir oben alles erkunden und mussten keinen Eintritt zahlen!
reviews.textTranslated: In May 2026, it was unfortunately quite overgrown with some thorny plants, but we were still able to explore everything up there and didn't have to pay an entrance fee!

reviews.name: Tammo Burmann
reviews.text: Schöne alte Stadt. War super zum schlendern .
reviews.textTranslated: Beautiful old city. It was great for strolling around.

reviews.name: De reiziger
reviews.text: Zwaar voor ons. Wij zijn 60+ de jeugd rende ons voorbij. Dus wanneer je voldoende kracht en uithoudingsvermogen hebt is het leuk om te doen.
reviews.textTranslated: Tough for us. We are 60+, the youngsters ran past us. So if you have enough strength and stamina, it is fun to do.

reviews.name: Erowid Spark
reviews.text: Nice hike to test the cardio!  I made it in 7 minutes (was morning and no other people on the trail).  My normal walking shoes were just fine as well.  Some of the trail has steps that have seen better days, with most of the trail the usual mountain single track with rocks.

reviewContext.Fees: Free to access the viewing platform.
reviewContext.Restrooms: None near the trail, but maybe at the Castle.

reviews.name: NowiFate
reviews.text: Snelle route naar boven. Vergis je niet, het is alsnog een zware klim. Het rook er erg nostalgisch, naar natuur en zee-egels, maar er ligt ook veel afval.
reviews.textTranslated: A quick route to the top. Don't be fooled, it's still a tough climb. It smelled very nostalgic, of nature and sea urchins, but there was also a lot of trash.

reviews.name: Nelia Velasco
reviews.text: You can see this shortcut here if you want a fastest way to get in berat castle.

title: Gate of the Pasha
address: tek Porta e Pashait, Rruga Mihal Komnena 5001, Berat, Albania
street: tek Porta e Pashait, Rruga Mihal Komnena 5001
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: Mert Dogan
reviews.text: Paşa Sarayına açılan çok hoş işçiliğe sahip tarihi kapı. Kaleye giden taş yolun direkt başlangıcında bulunmakta ama biraz park yerine döndüğü için etrafında sürekli arabaların tıkış tıkış durması hoş bir görüntü oluşturmuyor. Lakin yine de bakımsız bırakıldığını düşünmüyorum, temizlik konusunda her sabah düzenli çöp toplanıyor. Kapı, içerideki meydan ve Paşa Saray kalıntısı gayet temiz ve doğal bir görüntüye sahip.
reviews.textTranslated: This historical gate, with its beautiful craftsmanship, leads to the Pasha Palace. It's located right at the beginning of the stone path leading to the castle, but because it's somewhat of a parking area, the constant congestion of cars around it isn't a pleasant sight. However, I don't think it's neglected; the trash is collected regularly every morning. The gate, the square inside, and the ruins of the Pasha Palace are all very clean and have a natural appearance.

reviews.name: Barochick
reviews.text: Jolie porte et place
reviews.textTranslated: Pretty door and square

reviews.name: Haci Ismail Uzun
reviews.text: Osmanlı döneminden kalma, Şehire Berat Şehrine giriş kapısı
reviews.textTranslated: The entrance gate to the city of Berat, dating from the Ottoman period.

title: 1001 Albanian Adventures
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: ambiente compostaggio
reviews.text: Berat è bellissima! Scoperto ogni suo angolo con la bravissima e competente guida Toni che poi si è rivelato un amico prezioso durante i nostri giorni di permanenza in questa bellissima cittadina. Toni ci ha dato anche preziosi consigli e dritte per il proseguimento del nostro viaggio in Albania. Consiglio vivamente a tutti di usufruire della competenza e disponibilità di questa bravissima persona. Grazie Albania, sei stata una piacevole scoperta❤️
reviews.textTranslated: Berat is beautiful! We discovered every corner of it with the wonderful and knowledgeable guide Toni, who turned out to be a precious friend during our stay in this beautiful town. Toni also gave us valuable advice and tips for the rest of our trip in Albania. I highly recommend everyone to take advantage of this wonderful person's expertise and helpfulness. Thank you, Albania, you were a pleasant discovery ❤️

reviews.name: robbe smulders
reviews.text:
We had a great experience! The guide was very kind and helpfull. Told a lot of interesting facts and stories.
The tour was very beautifull, highly recommend!

reviews.name: cymro Gygo
reviews.text:
Exceptional experience – 10 out of 5 stars!

Our trip with 101 Adventure Albania to the Osumi Canyon and other locations was truly wonderful.
What made this experience unique was our guide, Orest. Beyond the stunning landscapes, he shared fascinating insights into Albanian history and the country’s inspiring religious harmony. Sharing personal stories and experiencing his genuine kindness was a rare pleasure.
It’s not every day you find such a high level of hospitality and knowledge. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Adrian McAsey
reviews.text: The tour out to the waterfall and canyon were fantastic, and I can't recommend them more. Orest was a great guide with tonnes of local knowledge. Can't be missed.

reviews.name: Estefania Vina
reviews.text: This is a rafting experience not to miss if you are visiting Albania!! Definitely the highlight of our trip here, the guide is super friendly and explains interesting things about the canyon and the culture !!! Many thanks for the memories !!

reviews.name: diego gallego muñoz
reviews.text: Magnífica experiencia la de de hoy. Aunque la actividad lo se ofrece en español, es totalmente recomendable. Orest, nuestro guía nos hizo comprender todo a la perfección. Entre un poco de italiano, español e inglés no hubo problemas. Es un gran profesional y una persona muy amable! Los paisajes de película!! 100% recomendable!
reviews.textTranslated: What a fantastic experience today! Although the activity isn't offered in Spanish, it's highly recommended. Orest, our guide, explained everything perfectly. Between a little Italian, Spanish, and English, there were no problems. He's a true professional and a very kind person! The scenery was breathtaking! 100% recommended!

reviews.name: Sophia Zeyse
reviews.text: We joined the tour to Osum Canyon and had a great day. Orest is a careful driver, so we felt very safe. He taught us a lot about albanian history and culture, it was super interesting and he is a great guy. The canyon is amazing. So worth it. Recommend.

title: Berat City Tours
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: Leire
reviews.text: Ruta guiada muy completa, con un guía estupendo, Soni. Durante el trayecto nos fue explicando curiosidades sobre Albania y Berat. Tras realizar rutas de ensueño por el cañon de Osumi, disfrutamos de un chapuzón y comimos frente al río. Encantadas con la experiencia!
reviews.textTranslated: A very comprehensive guided tour with a fantastic guide, Soni. Throughout the journey, he shared interesting facts about Albania and Berat. After enjoying breathtaking hikes through the Osumi Canyon, we took a refreshing dip and had lunch by the river. We were delighted with the experience!

reviews.name: Manon de Jong
reviews.text: Geweldige tour gehad met een goede gids. De hike was soms best ‘challenging’ maar je werd er goed doorheen geholpen en daarna een prachtig uitzicht!! Onderweg naar de plekken verteld de gids veel over de omgeving en de geschiedenis ervan en na afloop een heerlijke lunch. Aanrader!
reviews.textTranslated: Had a great tour with a good guide. The hike was quite challenging at times, but you were guided through it well, and afterwards there was a beautiful view! On the way to the sites, the guide told us a lot about the area and its history, and afterwards there was a delicious lunch. Highly recommended!

reviews.name: Karman
reviews.text: We hebben met een klein busje een tour door Osumi canyon gedaan. Wij liepen de avond van te voren het kantoor in en konden de volgende dag nog mee. De weg is kronkelig, maar wel verhard, toch mag je er met de huurauto van veel maatschappijen niet komen, omdat het laatste deel van de weg naar permet niet verhard is. Goede chauffeur en fijne gids die onderweg veel vertelt. Lunch is inclusief en er is word rekening gehouden met dieetwensen. Er zijn voldoende stops voor toilet bezoek en bij uitzicht punten en je maakt twee keer een korte wandeling (waterval en kloof). Er is ook twee keer gelegenheid om te zwemmen, maar het water is rond de 10 graden (in mei). Zeker deze tour boeken als je in Berat bent!
reviews.textTranslated: We took a tour through Osumi Canyon in a small van. We walked into the office the evening before and were able to join the next day. The road is winding but paved; however, many companies do not allow rental cars there because the last part of the road to Permet is unpaved. The driver was good, and the guide was great and shared a lot along the way. Lunch is included, and dietary requirements are taken into account. There are plenty of stops for restroom breaks and at viewpoints, and you take two short hikes (waterfall and canyon). There are also two opportunities to swim, but the water is around 10 degrees (in May). Definitely book this tour if you are in Berat!

reviews.name: Mar Fernández Vieites
reviews.text: Muy buena la excursión al Cañón del Osumi y la catarata de Bovoge. Soni es un gran guía y nos contó muchísimo sobre la historia de Albania y su gente ❤️
reviews.textTranslated: The excursion to Osumi Canyon and Bovoge Waterfall was fantastic. Soni is a great guide and told us so much about the history of Albania and its people ❤️

reviews.name: Valentina
reviews.text: Es war ein super schöner Start in den Urlaub. Wir haben eine Osum Canyon & Bogove Waterfall Tour gebucht. Soni ist ein super Guide, 💯 Punkte. Während der Fahrt hat Soni uns über Albanien, Berat und Traditionen informiert. Hat uns einige Aussichtspunkte in Canyon gezeigt und Legenden erzählt :) Wir würden jederzeit die Tour wieder buchen. Vielen Dank an Soni. Wir hatten einen wunderschönen Tag.
reviews.textTranslated: It was a fantastic start to our holiday. We booked an Osum Canyon & Bogove Waterfall tour. Soni is a superb guide, 100 points! During the drive, Soni told us about Albania, Berat, and its traditions. He showed us some viewpoints in the canyon and shared legends. We would book the tour again in a heartbeat. Thank you so much, Soni! We had a wonderful day.

reviews.name: Thomas Gesick
reviews.text: Igi was an absolutely fantastic tour guide for the Osumi Canyon and Bogove Waterfall tour. He was super friendly and knowledgeable and it made our trip to Berat unforgettable!

reviews.name: Massimo Briani
reviews.text: Amazing tour of Berat with Saimir. He is really professional tour leader with an incredible knowledge of the Berat history and traditions. He speaks perfectly Italian and for us it was an important plus. Super recommended!

reviews.name: Michael Newman
reviews.text: The Perfect Tour Guide. We had a wonderful tour around the city of Berat with Samil. He was knowledgeable, humourous and endlessly patient covering the history of this fascinating city at the crossroads of so many cultures. Thank you.

reviews.name: Coralie -
reviews.text: J'ai adoré l'excursion au Canyon D'Ossum. J'y suis allée fin Octobre donc l'eau était plus froide donc on a privilégié la randonnée au-dessus du Canyon avec une superbe vue et on est tout de même descendu dans le canyon à un endroit où on pouvait se baigner si on le souhaitait. C'était agréable d'être avec le guide Soni qui a bien conduit tout en nous parlant de l'histoire de son pays.
reviews.textTranslated: I loved the Ossum Canyon excursion. I went at the end of October so the water was colder so we preferred the hike above the Canyon with a superb view and we still went down into the canyon to a place where we could swim if we wanted. It was nice to be with the guide Soni who drove well while telling us about the history of his country.

title: Berat Viewing Platform
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: Volkanovic
reviews.text: Schöne Aussichtsplattform mit tollem Blick man kann schon bis nach Berat rüberschauen. Perfekt, um schöne Fotos zu machen. Insgesamt ein sehr schöner Ort für einen kurzen Stopp und zum Genießen der Aussicht.
reviews.textTranslated: A beautiful viewing platform with a fantastic view; you can even see as far as Berat. Perfect for taking beautiful photos. Overall, a very nice spot for a short stop and to enjoy the view.

reviews.name: Marek Wlodarczyk
reviews.text: Najpiękniejszy widok, warto było tutaj przyjechać.
reviews.textTranslated: The most beautiful view, it was worth coming here.

reviews.name: Berat Kağan Anar
reviews.text: Beni izlemeniz çok ayıp 😃
reviews.textTranslated: It's very rude of you to be watching me 😃

reviews.name: Laurent
reviews.text: Une magnifique vue sur la vallée, qui est encore plus belle si avez montée à pied jusqu'au belvédère.
reviews.textTranslated: A magnificent view over the valley, which is even more beautiful if you have walked up to the viewpoint.

reviews.name: Jaroslav Mida
reviews.text: Amazing views

title: Berat Castle
subTitle: Kalaja e Beratit
description: Remains of a sprawling 13th-century fortress that once housed 20 churches & a mosque.
imageCategories: Castle Church: Holy Trinity Church Building
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: Not the best castle. But cool one.

reviews.name: ramona
reviews.text:
Posto meraviglioso....pieno di storia e cultura....Camminare tra le mura del Castello di Berat (Kala) è come fare un viaggio indietro nel tempo. La cosa più affascinante è che si tratta di una "fortezza viva": ancora oggi, all’interno delle sue antiche mura, ci sono case abitate, stradine acciottolate e un’atmosfera magica che domina tutta la valle.

La vista che si gode da quassù è semplicemente mozzafiato e ogni pietra racconta secoli di storia, tra chiese bizantine e architettura ottomana. Un luogo unico al mondo, dichiarato Patrimonio dell'Umanità UNESCO, che va assolutamente visitato se siete in Albania! 🇦🇱📸
reviews.textTranslated:
A wonderful place...full of history and culture...Walking within the walls of Berat Castle (Kala) is like taking a journey back in time. The most fascinating thing is that it is a "living fortress": even today, within its ancient walls, there are inhabited houses, cobblestone streets, and a magical atmosphere that dominates the entire valley.

The view from up here is simply breathtaking, and every stone tells of centuries of history, from Byzantine churches to Ottoman architecture. A unique place in the world, declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site, an absolute must-see if you're in Albania! 🇦🇱📸

reviews.name: Kanishk
reviews.text: Good spot for a quick stop, the high elevation leaves you with fantastic views for the city.

reviews.name: Laith MF
reviews.text: An ancient historical site with many restaurants and shops selling traditional Albanian items and souvenirs tucked away in its alleyways... absolutely wonderful to spend a pleasant time and enjoy seeing the city at night, and the sunset was also breathtaking.

reviews.name: Steffi E.
reviews.text: Sehr eindrucksvoll Areal. Der Wehg war etwas schwierig zu finden.
reviews.textTranslated: A very impressive area. The path was a bit difficult to find.

title: Old Town Berat
address: PW4X+8XV Old Town, Rruga Kol Myzeqari, Berat 5001, Albania
street: PW4X+8XV Old Town, Rruga Kol Myzeqari
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: Nastanitev v hotelu z lepim pogledom na stari del mesta.

reviews.name: Paula Clarke
reviews.text: It reminded me of harry potter and it's absolutely unique and georgous little town.

reviews.name: Laci Vida
reviews.text: Szezonban kocsival felmenni, és parkolót találni szinte lehetetlen. A várban laknak, így séta közben van autó forgalom. Kilátás szép.
reviews.textTranslated: In season it is almost impossible to go up by car and find a parking space. They live in the castle, so there is car traffic while walking. The view is beautiful.

reviews.name: Nicole Schubert
reviews.text: Wunderschöne Gegend mit vielen tollen Eindrücken
reviews.textTranslated: A beautiful area with many wonderful impressions.

title: King Mosque (Sultan’s Mosque)
subTitle: Xhamia Mbret (Xhamia e Sulltanit)
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: M. H Baig
reviews.text:
Mosque is basic but good and reflects the legacy of Ottomans in the region, however the arrogant Imam is charging 100 lek per person (a forced donation) to everyone who is visiting mosque. A donation should be voluntarily, otherwise call it a ticket and give evidence (receipt) of receiving.

You can’t rudely turn away people who are visiting the mosques especially non muslims.

reviews.name: esra nur esra nur
reviews.text: Görülmesi gereken bir eser.Otantik .Merdivenleri çok ilginçti.Güzelliğin devamı , caminin bakımı için bağış yapabilirsiniz.🌸
reviews.textTranslated: A must-see. Authentic. The stairs were very interesting. To ensure its continued beauty and upkeep, you can make a donation to the mosque. 🌸

reviews.name: Erhan Turgut
reviews.text: Harika ahşap dekorasyonu ve huzur veren ortamıyla ecdadımızın ruhunu hissedebildiğimiz mübarek mekan... Tika'nın restorasyonu ve cami imanının gayretleriyle, harika bir ibadethane olarak yaşamaya devam ediyor. Girişte, yerel valilik kararıyla tüm ziyaretçilerden toplanan 100 LEK bağış genel giderler için kullanılıyor. Biz de gönlümüzden gelerek katkıda bulunmaktan mutlu olduk. Emeği geçen herkesten Allah razı olsun....
reviews.textTranslated: A blessed place where we can feel the spirit of our ancestors with its wonderful wooden decoration and peaceful atmosphere... Thanks to TIKA's restoration and the efforts of the mosque's imams, it continues to live on as a magnificent place of worship. At the entrance, a donation of 100 LEK is collected from all visitors by a decision of the local governorship and used for general expenses. We were also happy to contribute from the bottom of our hearts. May God bless everyone who contributed....

reviews.name: Karl B.
reviews.text:
Sehr schöne Moschee am Rande der (moslemischen) Altstadt. Für eine (lächerlich geringe) Spende von 100 LEK kann man sich im Inneren des Gebäudes außerhalb der Gebetszeiten weitgehend frei bewegen - auch auf der Empore, die ansonsten den Frauen vorbehalten ist. Die Moschee ist in gutem Zustand, vor allem die Holzdecke über der Empore ist aus handwerklicher Sicht und in der Farbzusammensetzung hervorzuheben.
Dass man sich an die Regeln des Islam bezüglich Kleidung und Benehmen hält, sollte selbstverständlich sein.
reviews.textTranslated:
A very beautiful mosque on the edge of the (Muslim) old town. For a (ridiculously small) donation of 100 LEK, you can move around the interior of the building largely freely outside of prayer times – including the gallery, which is otherwise reserved for women. The mosque is in good condition; the wooden ceiling above the gallery is particularly noteworthy for its craftsmanship and color scheme.

It should go without saying that one adheres to the rules of Islam regarding dress and behavior.

reviews.name: Umut KENAR (1bulutadam)
reviews.text: Girmek için para istiyorlar. Biraz üstelediğim de bağış adını geçirdi. Ancak bağış adı altında insanları dolandırıyorlar. Şikayet etmek için Tourist information center şikayette bulunabilirsiniz.
reviews.textTranslated: They're asking for money to enter. When I pressed them a bit, they referred to it as a donation. However, they're scamming people under the guise of donations. You can file a complaint with the Tourist Information Center.

reviews.name: Metin Kıymaç
reviews.text: Elimde olsa sıfır veririm. Girişte hiç bir bilet ya da makbuz kesmeden bağış altında 100 Leke para istiyorlar. Dolandırıcılıkta son seviye.
reviews.textTranslated: I would give them a zero if I could. They ask for 100 Leke as a donation at the entrance without issuing any ticket or receipt. This is the ultimate scam.

reviews.name: M Al
reviews.text: Imam was really helpful for advice. The architecture is amazing. Wudu area and toilets are clean. Theres an old grave infront of the mosque by the entrance.

reviews.name: Shah M. Rahman
reviews.text: An absolute must visit, just be mindful that tourist visiting times are limited and the masjid is locked outside of these times. Ornate wooden ceiling and artwork, this alone is worth the visit to Berat.

title: PocoPico_Coctait&Bar
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: arapi andra
reviews.text: Nice coctail😍

reviews.name: Ian Walpole
reviews.text: Had a lovey coffee in the daytime.

reviewContext.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk

reviews.name: Giritlim Butik Otel
reviews.text: Berat 'da köprünün karşısında en güzel manzaraya karşı harika kokteyller var.İşletme ,sunum mükemmel.Müzik de müthiş.Teşekkürler.❤️🙏
reviews.textTranslated: In Berat, there are amazing cocktails with the most beautiful view across the bridge. The service and presentation are excellent. The music is fantastic too. Thank you. ❤️🙏

reviews.name: הודיה רונן
reviews.text: אחלה של מקום קוקטלים ברמה גבוהה ממש
reviews.textTranslated: A great place for really high-level cocktails

reviews.name: Demal Mégane
reviews.text: Je recommande, serveur et service au top !! Les cocktail sont délicieux ! 😋
reviews.textTranslated: I recommend, server and service are top notch!! The cocktails are delicious! 😋

reviews.name: Logan Leclercq
reviews.text: Serveur très sympathique , cocktail de qualité , accueil très chaleureux, je recommande fortement 🫶🏽
reviews.textTranslated: Very friendly waiter, excellent cocktail, very warm welcome, I highly recommend it 🫶🏽

reviews.name: Ian Coulton
reviews.text: Fantastic small cocktail bar, super friendly staff, great cocktails at budget frendly prices and awesome music. Would 100% recommend 👌

reviews.name: Fabjan Gremshi
reviews.text:
This was one of the most nicest bars in berat it was the only one who stayed open after 00:00
Delicious cocktails and a very friendly staff
And very affordable prices
Nice music
And a great atmosphere

title: Homemade Food Lili
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania
openingHoursBusinessConfirmationText: Updated by this business 5 weeks ago

updatesFromCustomers.text: Sophia i Thomas, Monika i Tomek, Tania i Piotrek oraz Ewa i ja czyli goście plus Mirela i Lilly czyli gospodarze ❤️

reviews.name: Johannes Klein
reviews.text: Die Betreiber sind sehr gute Gastgeber. An den Chared-Tables kommt man mit den anderen Gäste schnell ins Gespräch und hat einen unvergesslichen Abend!
reviews.textTranslated: The owners are excellent hosts. At the shared tables, it's easy to strike up a conversation with the other guests and have an unforgettable evening!

reviewContext.Vegetarian options: Es gibt eine kleine Auswahl, abhängig von der aktuellen Karte.

reviews.name: BinBesserAlsDu
reviews.text: Best dining experience ever! 😊

reviews.name: Nick Z.
reviews.text: This is one of the most interesting places I've ever been. Lili as such is a great and funny person who speaks a lot of languages.  His friendlyness and outstanding service is unforgettable. The location is special and the food excellent. It is an absolute "must go" location. Thanks Lili for a great experience combined with exellent food.

reviews.name: J R
reviews.text: I didn't get to eat there, because it was full (Saturday night), but the host was SO nice to me I need to rate it.

reviews.name: Patricia und Manfred
reviews.text: Der Besuch dieses Restaurants ist mehr als nur Essen gehen. Lili ist superfreundlich, macht alles noch persönlicher indem er die Gäste immer mit Namen anspricht. Er ist ein wahrer Entertainer. Wir hatten Glück am Shared-Table zu sitzen mit lieben Menschen aus verschiedenen Ländern. So sind neue Kontakte entstanden. Dazu noch das echt sehr schmackhafte Essen, der selbstgemachte Rotwein und Raki, einfach ein tolles Erlebnis und ein unvergesslicher Abend. Danke an Lili und seine Familie ❤️
reviews.textTranslated: Visiting this restaurant is more than just going out to eat. Lili is incredibly friendly and makes everything even more personal by always addressing guests by name. He's a true entertainer. We were lucky enough to sit at a shared table with lovely people from different countries, which led to some wonderful new connections. Add to that the truly delicious food, the homemade red wine and raki, and it was simply a fantastic experience and an unforgettable evening. Thank you to Lili and his family ❤️

reviews.name: Jeremy Naylor
reviews.text: Thank you so much for an amazing evening 🙏

reviewContext.Recommended dishes: Stuffed Aubergine, Stuffed Eggplant, Lamb with Yogurt

reviews.name: J.H.
reviews.text: Many thanks to Lili and his family for this unique experience! We had a great diner with people from all over the world. The food was excellent. All the best from Monique and Joel from Germany!

reviews.name: Hakan Reis
reviews.text: Gerçekten sahibi olan beyefendi çok orijinal bir karakter ve mükemmel bir deneyim sunuyor insana. Biz tek masaydık ve bu sebepten servis harikaydı. Adeta adamın evine akşam misafir olmuşuz gibi bizi ağırladı, yemekler harici kendi yaptığı rakı, şarap ve tüm ürünlerden tattırdı. Kendisi ingilizce yanında anlaşacak kadar da Türkçe biliyor. Rezervasyon şansı pek yok off sezonlarda gitmek biraz daha şansınızı arttırıyor, yemekler ise gerçekten lezzetli. Her bir yemeğin kendi ayrı rahiyası ve aroması var ve tarihi ile alakalı da bilgi veriyor paylaşımları çok güzel. Ben kesinlikle öneririm Berat deneyimimizi eşsiz bir hala getirdi Lili Bey. Sadece bir yemekte domuz ürünü var kendisi bunu belirtip menüden onu çıkartıyor. Tadım menüsü tarzı bir fix menüsü var ve hepsi bölgenin yöresel yemekleri.
reviews.textTranslated: The owner, a truly unique gentleman, offers a truly exceptional experience. We were the only table, and because of that, the service was fantastic. He treated us as if we were guests in his home for the evening, offering us samples of his homemade raki, wine, and all his other products besides the main dishes. He speaks enough Turkish to communicate in addition to English. Reservations are not very likely; going during the off-season increases your chances. The food is truly delicious. Each dish has its own unique aroma and flavor, and he also shares information about its history, which is wonderful. I definitely recommend it. Mr. Lili made our Berat experience truly unique. There's only one dish that contains pork, and he specifically mentioned this and removed it from the menu. He has a fixed menu, like a tasting menu, and all the dishes are regional specialties.

reviews.name: Janina Kaissermueller
reviews.text: Was soll ich sagen, es war eine tolle Erfahrung. Das Essen von Lilis Frau ist Mega. Man kommt mit anderen Leuten zusammen. Es ist einfach eine tollte Atmosphäre etwas ganz was anderes als klassisch in ein Restaurant zu gehen.
reviews.textTranslated: What can I say, it was a fantastic experience. Lili's wife's food is amazing. You meet other people. It's simply a great atmosphere, something completely different from going to a traditional restaurant.

title: Hotel & Traditional Food Ansel
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: Tradycyjne jedzenie bardzo smaczne. Zamówiliśmy zestaw dla dwóch osob i bylo az za duzo. Bardzo mila i pomocna obsluga. Jedynym minusem byly drinki aperol spritz- najgorsze jakie piliśmy w życiu.

reviews.name: Mykola Dykun
reviews.text: Pyszne śniadanie z pięknym widokiem , pan kelner bardzo miły ‚ uprzejmy i pomocny 😋
reviews.textTranslated: Delicious breakfast with a beautiful view, the waiter was very nice, polite and helpful 😋

reviews.name: Sebastjan Mero
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you so much! We are happy you enjoyed your dining experience at Ansel Restaurant!

reviews.name: Renilde Vrijsen
reviews.text:
Heel vriendelijk, lekker eten, top !!!
Meatballs waren voortreffelijk!!!
reviews.textTranslated:
Very friendly, delicious food, top-notch !!!

Meatballs were exquisite!!!
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Happy you enjoyed our fresh dishes!

reviews.name: Maelis Dubois
reviews.text: Incroyable repas fait maison et prix bas, une vue magnifique et un super service 😍
reviews.textTranslated: Incredible homemade meal at a low price, a magnificent view and great service 😍
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: We are happy you enjoyed the authentic local experience!

reviews.name: Savanna Taylor
reviews.text:
The only reason to stay here is for the food, views, and service. Rooms are uncomfortable, pillows are thick memory foam. Worst part, our room had a second door to the hallway with glass windows that were covered with a curtain ON THE OUTSIDE,  so anyone in the hallway (or walking off the street, as the dogs to the outside and the gate were never locked) could look directly into your bed, without even trying. We covered with a towel but didn't feel safe
Breakfast is good but a waste of food if you don't eat the 4 donuts and 300g of yogurt per person.  I won't recommend this place.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
Thank you for your feedback. Our property is a protected UNESCO heritage house dating back to the 1720s, and we continuously work to improve guest comfort while preserving the authentic historic character of the building.

We would also like to clarify that guest privacy and safety are very important to us. The security cameras are located in the outdoor courtyard and street entrance areas, and it is not possible for anyone to view inside guest rooms.

Regarding breakfast, we offer generous traditional portions prepared with fresh local products. We understand that eating preferences and portion sizes can be different for every guest.

We appreciate your comments and are always working to provide the best possible experience for our guests.

reviews.name: Will F.
reviews.text: Absolutely perfect, a real gem. Super good service and food.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for your kind words|

reviewContext.Hotel highlights: Luxury, Great view, Romantic, Quiet, Great value

reviews.name: Mohamed Arif
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
So happy you enjoyed the food!
Hope to welcome you again in Berat!

reviews.name: Lama Bipin
reviews.text:
Excellent restaurant ! Très bon accueil, service rapide et plats délicieux.
Je recommande sans hésiter 👍
reviews.textTranslated:
Excellent restaurant! Very welcoming, fast service, and delicious food.
I highly recommend it! 👍
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Thank you for the amazing feedback!

reviews.name: Clement Chotin
reviews.text: Le restaurant est incroyable et le serveur est super gentil et très agréable. Je recommande fortement
reviews.textTranslated: The restaurant is amazing and the waiter is super friendly and very pleasant. I highly recommend it.

reviews.name: Fation Malka
reviews.text: Best view,best food.Stephan 10/10 service for us👍🫡
reviews.responseFromOwnerText: Glad you enjoyed our warm hospitality!

title: Friendly House
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: Bratschnik
reviews.text: Es hat eine Säule gedauert bis wir bestellen konnten. Das Essen war aber lecker, das warten hat sich gelohnt.
reviews.textTranslated: It took a while before we could order. But the food was delicious, the wait was worth it.

reviews.name: Jean-Michel Prost
reviews.text: Restaurant avec terrasse et belle vue sur le quartier orthodoxe de Berat. Service efficace voire rapide pour assurer la rotation! Nourriture correcte et bon rapport qualité prix.
reviews.textTranslated: Restaurant with a terrace and a beautiful view of Berat's Orthodox quarter. Efficient, even fast, service to keep up with demand! Decent food and good value for money.

reviews.name: Michael J.
reviews.text: Wir waren mit einer Reisegruppe da. Die Speisen waren gut bis befriedigend. Das Lamm war nicht zu empfehlen. Sehr fett, wenig Fleisch. Service war gut, es hat aber auch unser Busfahrer geholfen. Ambiente ist echt schön.
reviews.textTranslated: We were there with a tour group. The food ranged from good to satisfactory. The lamb was not recommended – very fatty with very little meat. Service was good, but our bus driver also helped out. The atmosphere is really nice.

reviewContext.Group size: 9+ people, Suitable for all group sizes

reviews.name: Kate Bishop
reviews.text:
Just perfect for lunch -delicious stuffed vine leaves & incredible aubergine.
House white wine was lovely too.

Highly recommended for a relaxing meal away from the busy streets.

Friendly staff and great value for all we had.

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews.name: Miquel Àngel Ferrà Alemany
reviews.text:
Recomendación de nuestra guia en el lugar, sin duda muy acertada.

Restaurante con una terraza panorámica que nos otorga unas espectaculares vistas del pueblo y del rio.

La carta es bastante tradicional, aunque también ofrece bastantes opciones más “para todos los gustos” como filetes empanados o espaguetis.
Nosotros nos decantamos por los platos típicos de la zona con influencia griega y fue todo un acierto, sobretodo recomiendo la mousaka (aunque ciertamente le faltaba algo de jugosidad) y los pimientos rellenos de arroz.
reviews.textTranslated:
Our local guide's recommendation was spot on.

The restaurant boasts a panoramic terrace offering spectacular views of the town and the river.

The menu is quite traditional, though it also offers plenty of options to suit all tastes, such as breaded cutlets and spaghetti. We opted for the typical local dishes with Greek influences, and it was a great choice. I especially recommend the moussaka (although it could have been a bit juicier) and the peppers stuffed with rice.

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace
reviewContext.Vegetarian options: Sí, por ejemplo, pimientos rellenos de arroz

reviews.name: Deb
reviews.text:
Tasty food
Large portions

title: St. Michael's Church
subTitle: Kisha e Shën Mehillit
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: Probablement des offrandes à Saint Michaël

images.authorName: Phansak พิพัฒน์ฯ

reviews.name: Lili
reviews.text: Très joli et belle vue sur la ville. Il fallait payer pour entrer, mais il n’y a rien à voir à l’intérieur
reviews.textTranslated: Very pretty and a beautiful view of the city. There was an entrance fee, but nothing to see inside.

reviews.name: Brian
reviews.text: It’s a steep descent from the castle, but you’re rewarded with beautiful views and the old, small church. Unfortunately, the experience is spoiled by a rude church guardian who insists on payment.

reviews.name: Alba Mustafaj
reviews.text: The views from here are stunning and also the hike there. I really enjoyed this one.

reviews.name: Prasanth Amdocs
reviews.text: There is a man , who will force you to give money

reviews.name: Milla
reviews.text: The church itself is absolutely breathtaking, beautiful art with an amazing view and enjoyable climb up. Unfortunately me and my friends’ time at the church was tainted by the worker there who was pushy, creepy and leering at us, and was overall rude. We felt uncomfortable and our visit was cut short when we could have spent hours there. we couldn’t focus on the art or enjoy ourselves and the man completely cut through the holy spiritual feeling that would’ve been appropriate for this incredible historic setting. The isolation of it was the most scary thing and unfortunately we had to leave. I would caution groups of young girls from going here unchaperoned

reviews.name: TLENCH Lo
reviews.text: Супер красиво, вид прекрасный
reviews.textTranslated: Super beautiful, the view is wonderful

reviews.name: 초이의 모든경험
reviews.text:
볼거리가 많지않고 가격은 인당 1€ 레크도 상관없다고 했습니다.
저희는 2명이어서 200LEK를 냈는데 돈이 아까웠습니다. 돈을 내서 그런지 관리인분은 친절했습니다

베라트성 방문은 추천하지만
이곳은 추천하지 않습니다

-세계여행자-
reviews.textTranslated:
There isn't much to see, and they said the price was €1 per person, and that Lek was fine.

Since there were two of us, we paid 200 Lek, but it felt like a waste of money. Perhaps because we paid, the caretaker was kind.

I recommend visiting Berat Castle, but

I do not recommend this place.

-World Traveler-

reviews.name: Steffi
reviews.text: Going inside the church costs money! There is no sign telling this bevore you go inside. it's 1€ per person. The view from up there is good, just don't go inside the curch.

title: Zonja Gjene

updatesFromCustomers.text: Sehr nette Leute, freundliche Bedienung und super Essen.

reviews.name: Bilbo
reviews.text: Trato fantástico, sitio estupendo, ojalá tengan mucha suerte con el proyecto
reviews.textTranslated: Fantastic service, great place, I hope they have a lot of success with the project

reviews.name: Annalisa Ghirotti
reviews.text: Io e mia sorella siamo state a cena e abbiamo mangiato benissimo. Locale molto bello, arredato con gusto. Ambiente tranquillo e rilassante. Musica di sottofondo perfetta. Personale estremamente gentile e professionale.
reviews.textTranslated: My sister and I went for dinner and had a wonderful meal. The place was beautiful, tastefully decorated. The atmosphere was quiet and relaxing. The background music was perfect. The staff was extremely kind and professional.

reviews.name: Elyn Kim
reviews.text: I asked for a Korean-style iced Americano, and they made it perfectly! The atmosphere was elegant, and the decorations were beautiful. I definitely recommend this place to anyone staying in Berat!!

reviews.name: Julita Danilczuk
reviews.text: We had an amazing evening! 🍷 The staff passionately explained the wines and shared lots of interesting stories and details. The appetizers were delicious and the atmosphere was fantastic !  Definitely a place worth visiting!

reviews.textTranslated: Beautiful decor and a lovely atmosphere. The waiter was very pleasant and the food was excellent. I highly recommend it!

reviews.name: J R
reviews.text: The staff was very nice, but I'm afraid I was disappointed by the food.

reviews.name: Luis Garcia Moya
reviews.text: Bien
reviews.textTranslated: GOOD

title: Bachelors' Mosque
subTitle: Xhamia e Beqareve
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: Njëra ndër xhamitë më të bukura në Berat

reviews.name: Hamida Najib
reviews.text: Worth a visit . Pretty well kept, clean drinking water outside. Super for those who want quiet time

reviews.name: Habibe Öztürk
reviews.text: Berat'a gidildiğinde görülmesi gereken camilerden biri. Caminin içindeki mobilyalar tekrar gözden geçirildiginde eminim çok daha güzel bir yer olacak. Görevli arkadaş da samimi bir şekilde ilgilendi.
reviews.textTranslated: This is one of the mosques you should see when you go to Berat. I'm sure it will be an even more beautiful place if the furniture inside is refurbished. The staff member was also very friendly and helpful.

reviews.name: H
reviews.text: La mosquée était fermée
reviews.textTranslated: The mosque was closed

reviews.name: selinnssahin
reviews.text: Küçük ve tarih kokuyor
reviews.textTranslated: It's small and steeped in history.

reviews.name: Gio Lante
reviews.text: Una bellissima moschea che si sposa bene con lo stile della caratteristica città di Berat. Gli affreschi sono meravigliosi.
reviews.textTranslated: A beautiful mosque that blends well with the style of the characteristic city of Berat. The frescoes are marvelous.

reviews.name: Urko Torres
reviews.text: Por fuera es bonita pero estaba cerrada en horario que supuestamente ponía abierto
reviews.textTranslated: It looks nice from the outside, but it was closed during the hours it was supposed to be open.

reviews.name: Nasrettin Güneş
reviews.text:
Berat Bekarlar Camii (Bachelor’s Mosque) şehrin en farklı ve dikkat çekici camilerinden biri 🕌

Dışarıdan sade görünse de asıl güzelliği içeride ortaya çıkıyor. Duvarlardaki süslemeler ve resimler klasik camilerden oldukça farklı; daha sanatsal ve özgün bir tarzı var. Bu yönüyle diğer Osmanlı camilerinden ayrılıyor.

Mangalem bölgesinde yer aldığı için konum olarak da çok güzel bir noktada. Kısa sürede gezilebiliyor ama bıraktığı etki oldukça güçlü.

📌 Öne çıkanlar:
•	İç süslemeleri ve freskleri çok farklı
•	Küçük ama karakterli bir yapı
•	Merkezi ve kolay ulaşılabilir

👉 Kısacası:
Berat’ta klasik camilerden farklı bir şey görmek isteyenler için kesinlikle uğranması gereken özel bir durak
reviews.textTranslated:
The Bachelor's Mosque in Berat is one of the most unique and striking mosques in the city 🕌

Although it looks simple from the outside, its true beauty is revealed inside. The decorations and paintings on the walls are quite different from classical mosques; it has a more artistic and original style. In this respect, it stands apart from other Ottoman mosques.

Located in the Mangalem district, it's also in a very beautiful spot. It can be visited quickly, but the impression it leaves is quite strong.

📌 Highlights:
• Unique interior decorations and frescoes
• Small but characterful structure
• Central and easily accessible

👉 In short:

For those who want to see something different from classical mosques in Berat, it's a special stop that you absolutely must visit.

reviews.name: Av İbrahim Çınar (Kamulaştırma Avukatı)
reviews.text: Biz gittiğimizde Kapalıydı. Vakit namazları hariç kapatılıyor olabilir.
reviews.textTranslated: It was closed when we went. It might be closed except for prayer times.

reviews.text: Berat is een leuke plaats met een kasteel. Wel een beetje toeristisch.
reviews.textTranslated: Berat is a nice place with a castle. A bit touristy, though.

reviews.name: Steffi E.

title: camping villa juri
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

reviews.name: Dessy Mancheva (Nesheva)
reviews.text:
They do some repair works at the moment, so it is noisy, with lots of buckets, bricks and construction materials all over.
Bathrooms are available, they keep them clean. No electricity is available at the spots for tents. No refrigerator. Still the location is good - walking distance from the center and the castle with available stores and restaurants close by.

reviews.name: Patrick Den besten
reviews.text: Walking distance to city. Location is great. Expect basic facilities and lots of friendliness

reviews.name: M Van den Bos- Hogenkamp
reviews.text: Super locatie, op loopafstand van het oude centrum. Winkel in nabijheid. Schoon sanitair en heerlijke warme douche. Ontzettend aardige eigenaar en gezin.
reviews.textTranslated: Super location, within walking distance of the old town. Shops nearby. Clean bathroom and a lovely hot shower. Incredibly nice owner and family.

reviews.name: Hugo de With
reviews.text:
Leuke kampeerplaats midden in Berat.
Overdekte camperplaats tegen de zon
Oude stad op loopafstand
Supermarkt op 150 meter
Uitzicht op de burcht loopafstand 30-45 minuten
reviews.textTranslated:
Nice campsite in the middle of Berat.

Covered camper pitch for shade
Old town within walking distance
Supermarket at 150 meters
View of the castle, 30-45 minute walk

reviews.name: Mihkel Lindpere
reviews.text: Lovely and very warm host! Definetly reccomend to visit with camper. Great location! Although they're closed for this year and will open back on Feb 2026.

reviews.name: Linda B.
reviews.text: Spontan mit Auto und Zelt angekommen und herzlich empfangen worden – die Gastgeberin war super freundlich und hilfsbereit. Bei einem kleinen Reifendruck-Problem wurde uns gleich eine Werkstatt empfohlen. Saubere Sanitäranlagen, warme Dusche und tolle Lage für Sightseeing in der Stadt. Rundum angenehm!
reviews.textTranslated: We arrived spontaneously with our car and tent and received a warm welcome – the hostess was incredibly friendly and helpful. When we had a minor tire pressure issue, she immediately recommended a garage. The sanitary facilities were clean, the shower was hot, and the location was fantastic for sightseeing in the city. A thoroughly enjoyable stay!

reviews.name: JEAN_CLAUDEG564
reviews.text: Ce terrain de camping se situe en ville. Ayant un fourgon de 6,36 métres, c'est assez facile pour s'y rendre. Le point de difficultés est la rue  "Rruga Nexhip Xelali" car il faut traverser cette rue lorsqu'il n'y a pas de véhicules en sens invere. Autrement pas souci et il y a possibilité de manoeuvrer à l'intérieur du camping. Les emplacements ne sont pas larges et ceux-ci se situent sur du béton. Le bloc sanitaire est correct, présence de papier toilettes, liquide vaiselle, liquide main. Eau chaude à disposition non limitée., il y a un chauffe eau. Le bac à vaisselle se situe à un autre endroit. Il y a un restaurant, café mais lors de notre venue, celui-ci ne fonctionnait pas. A l'endroit du restaurant, il y a un grand espace de verdure avec tables et chaises. Idéal pour manger. En conclusion, pour visiter Bérat, centre-ville ou château c'est l'idéal car il n'y a pas besoin de taxi. Le prix d'un taxi coûte 10 euros pour le château par exemple car celui-ci est en hauteur, fort dénivelé si on y va à pied.  Camping très calme, près des commerces, des bars restaurants, sécurisé et sans bruit. Prix non élevé et très correct pour un emplacement en ville
reviews.textTranslated: This campsite is located in town. With a 6.36-meter van, it's quite easy to get there. The only tricky part is "Rruga Nexhip Xelali" street, as you have to cross it when there's no oncoming traffic. Otherwise, there's no problem, and there's plenty of room to maneuver within the campsite. The pitches aren't very wide and are on concrete. The sanitary block is adequate, with toilet paper, dish soap, and hand soap available. Hot water is available without limit, thanks to a water heater. The dishwashing sink is located elsewhere. There's a restaurant/café, but it wasn't open when we were there. The restaurant area is a large green space with tables and chairs, ideal for eating. In conclusion, it's ideal for visiting Berat, the town center, or the castle, as you don't need a taxi. A taxi to the castle costs €10, for example, as it's located on a hill, making it a steep climb if you try to walk. The campsite is very quiet, close to shops, bars, and restaurants, and is secure and peaceful. The price is reasonable and very fair for a location in town.

reviews.name: Erkan Erol
reviews.text: Harika....Rezervasyon yaptığım hostelin kapısını açamayıp giremedigimden sokak dan geçerken gördüm girdim kamp alanına.Çadır kurmaya,karavanla konaklamaya müsait ayrıca odaları var..Ortam temiz,aile işletmesi.Çadir,karavan,oda her ne olursa konaklama yapılacak bir yer,güvenli..Mutfak,kapalı ve açık ortak alan gayet yeterli..Tavsiye edilir...
reviews.textTranslated: Great... I couldn't open the door of the hostel I booked and couldn't enter, so I saw the campsite while passing by on the street. They also have rooms for tents and caravans. The environment is clean, family-run. Whether it's a tent, caravan, or a room, it's a great place to stay, and it's safe. The kitchen and indoor and outdoor common areas are quite sufficient. Recommended...

reviews.name: Uwe Zuther
reviews.text: empfehlenswert. mitten im ort, nette unaufdringliche eigen tümer.
reviews.textTranslated: Highly recommended. Located right in the town center, with friendly, unobtrusive owners.

title: Restaurant WilDor &ChefToska(halalfood)
address: Antipatrea on the left side gate 4 Berat 5001, Berat 5001, Albania
street: Antipatrea on the left side gate 4 Berat 5001
searchString: things to do in Berat Albania

updatesFromCustomers.text: Great food and nice location. Thank you for the lovely lunch.

reviews.name: Rodolfo Asar
reviews.text:
Run away from there. It's a typical tourist trap right across from the bridge exit.
The food is terrible, with misleading signs at the door, and once you go in they serve you leftovers and, to top it all off, they overcharge you.
Some people think tourists are stupid and can be taken advantage of to make easy money.
And that's how they're killing tourism in Berat, a beautiful city that doesn't deserve it.

Huyan de ahí. Es la típica trampa para turistas justo frente a la salida del puente.
Comida muy mala, con carteles engañosos en la puerta, y una vez que entras te dan de comer sobras y, por si fuera poco, te cobran de más.
Hay gente que cree que los viajeros somos estúpidos a los que exprimir para hacer dinero fácil.
Y así van matando el turismo en Berat, una ciudad preciosa que no se lo merece.
reviews.textTranslated:
Run away from there. It's a typical tourist trap right across from the bridge exit.

The food is terrible, with misleading signs at the door, and once you go in they serve you leftovers and, to top it all off, they overcharge you.

Some people think tourists are stupid and can be taken advantage of to make easy money.

And that's how they're killing tourism in Berat, a beautiful city that doesn't deserve it.

Run away from there. It's a typical tourist trap right across from the bridge exit.
The food is terrible, with misleading signs at the door, and once you go in they serve you leftovers and, to make matters worse, they overcharge you.

Some people think tourists are stupid and can be exploited for easy money.

And that's how they're killing tourism in Berat, a beautiful city that doesn't deserve it.
reviews.responseFromOwnerText:
We’re sorry to hear about your experience, but we respectfully disagree with several points in your review. We take pride in serving fresh, quality food and being transparent with our pricing and menu, which are clearly displayed for all guests.

We do not tolerate misleading practices or overcharging, and we certainly do not serve leftovers. Our team works hard to provide a positive experience to both locals and visitors, and many of our guests leave satisfied.

We’re always open to constructive feedback, but we believe this review does not accurately reflect our standards or the service we provide. If you’d like to discuss your visit further, we’d be happy to speak with you directly.
can you tell me what was the problem from the info you order the egss breakfast 
and you order coffe late that is not included on food 
so no one charged you extra 
the waiter explained that drinks or coffe not included on breakfast 
so becaus of this you dont need to spread fake review 
no one called you stupid you jusr payed araund 8 euros 
6 for food and 2 for coffe

reviews.name: Karima Ibourahima
reviews.text: Très bon restaurant situé le long du lac! Les plats sont copieux et délicieux.  Un grand merci à Lionel qui nous a très bien accueilli et servi! :)
reviews.textTranslated: Excellent restaurant located along the lake! The dishes are generous and delicious. A big thank you to Lionel who gave us a very warm welcome and served us so well! :)

reviews.name: Hasibe
reviews.text:
We had an amazing experience at Wildor Restaurant in Berat! Everything was absolutely delicious.

We were a group of 3 and created our own shared menu, which turned out to be perfect: the Wildor salad, stuffed pepper, stuffed eggplant, yaprak, baked cheese, and chicken fillet escalope (reccomended!!!!). Every single dish was full of flavour and beautifully prepared.

The staff was very kind, polite and welcoming, which made the experience even better. Everything from the food to the service exceeded our expectations.

We will definitely recommend this restaurant to our friends who plan to visit Berat. A must-visit when you’re in the city!

reviews.name: Savi Chen
reviews.text: 海鮮燉飯很不錯 米芯的口感很合我的胃口。服務員弟弟工作和服務態度都很好👍
reviews.textTranslated: The seafood risotto was very good; the texture of the rice in the middle was just to my liking. The waiter was also very nice and had a great attitude towards service. 👍

reviews.name: Kapkapchmurko
reviews.text:
Grandma's meatballs were okay but I would call it medium size - we received meatballs with little tomato sauce and bread. Baklava on the other hand was tasty but I wish there were more fruits added :)
You can only pay by cash (LEK and EUR)

reviews.name: The D.A.Y.
reviews.text:
Restaurant proposant de la viande halal, Idéalement situé en bordure de la route principale, juste à côté de la mosquée du Bachelor et du nouveau pont.
L'accueil fut bon présageant bonne suite mais ce ne fut pas totalement le cas hélas.
La salade du pays était bonne, les boulettes et le plat de viande à la sauce tomate et fromage cottage auraient pu être très bon avec moins de sel, c'est dommage.
Ensuite le service fut long pour avoir le dessert, un kadaif qui n'est pas cuit à la minute. Une fois servi j'ai compris pourquoi le serveur avait disparu pour apparaître une vingtaine de minutes après. Le kadaif était glacé, dur comme sortant du congélateur. J'ai fait la remarque au serveur qui s'est timidement excusé.
Bref, ce n'est pas mauvais mais mon expérience n'a pas été à la hauteur de ce que j'espérais
reviews.textTranslated:
A restaurant offering halal meat, ideally located on the main road, right next to the Bachelor Mosque and the new bridge.

The welcome was promising, but unfortunately, that wasn't entirely the case.
The country salad was good, but the meatballs and the meat dish with tomato sauce and cottage cheese could have been very good with less salt—a shame.
Then, the service was slow for dessert, a kadaif that wasn't cooked fresh. Once it was served, I understood why the waiter had disappeared, only to reappear about twenty minutes later. The kadaif was ice-cold, hard as if it had just come out of the freezer. I mentioned this to the waiter, who offered a half-hearted apology.
In short, it wasn't bad, but my experience didn't live up to my expectations.

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews.name: Eric van Wessel
reviews.text: Traditioneel en lekker halal eten. Buiten zit je op twee meter afstand van ronkende auto's voor het stoplicht, maar dat hoort bij het vakantiegevoel in een vreemd land.
reviews.textTranslated: Traditional and delicious halal food. Outside, you sit two meters away from roaring cars at the traffic light, but that is part of the holiday feeling in a foreign country.

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews.name: Zakir Hussain
reviews.text: Great food, good service.

reviewContext.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating, Counter seating
reviewContext.Vegetarian options: They do have some veg options but are limited.

reviews.name: Nerea Chica
reviews.text: We arrived with no reservation, at noon, 8 people. We left full, happy and definitely would go back again. The lamb chops were fantastic and all the traditional dishes were the best we had tasted in the whole trip.
